subject: duke energy marketing limited partnership/enron canada corp.

emails.subject: Duke Energy Marketing Limited Partnership/Enron Canada Corp.
emails.subject_base: Duke Energy Marketing Limited Partnership/Enron Canada Corp.
emails.body: Duke Energy Marketing Limited Partnership/Enron Canada Corp. Attached for your approval is the form of Enron Corp. Guaranty in favor of the referenced Counterparty, which guarantees the obligations of ENA under an ISDA Master Agreement. We will need the standard executed copy. In addition, we will need the following closing documents: Certificate of Incumbency. Upon approval and execution, please call me at x33399 to pick up the documents. Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

emails.body: Re: Duke Energy Marketing Limited Partnership/Enron Canada Corp. Hey, What's with the out dated effective date. 1996? I had just got to Enron in December 1996. Clem Tana Jones@ECT 09/05/00 05:02 PM
